'''Rattagagech''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Elomin/Legends|Elomin]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who represented [[Elom (planet)/Legends|Elom]] circa [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. He was chairbeing of the [[Science and Technology Council]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
